tool_args.label: TBTA PMT Refunding Bonds Series 2026A-1 Pricing
tool_args.raw_text: On March 4, 2026, the MTA successfully priced $763.555 million of Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority Payroll Mobility Tax Senior Lien Refunding Bonds, Series 2026A-1. The transaction closed on March 17, 2026.

payload.description: MTA priced $763.555 million of Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority Payroll Mobility Tax Senior Lien Refunding Bonds, Series 2026A-1

evidence_refs.source_quote: On March 4, 2026, the MTA successfully priced $763.555 million of Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority Payroll Mobility Tax Senior Lien Refunding Bonds, Series 2026A-1. The transaction closed on March 17, 2026.

tool_args.label: Bond refunding NPV savings
tool_args.raw_text: generating net present value savings of $28.5 million, or 7.97% of refunded par

tool_args.label: CBDTP loan refinancing expected
tool_args.raw_text: the Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority expects to refinance its $500 million Central Business District Tolling Program (CBDTP) loan ahead of its May 1, 2026 maturity.
